articles.title: Antarctica has a strange gravity hole and scientists finally know why

articles.title: Physicists finally see strange magnetic vortices predicted 50 years ago
articles.description: A team of physicists has experimentally confirmed a long-predicted sequence of exotic magnetic phases in an atomically thin material. articles.title: Not only is Lake Powell's water level plummeting because of drought, its total capacity is shrinking, too
